news.title: Amazon, Meta join fight to end Google Pay, PhonePe dominance in India
news.summary: PhonePe and Google Pay command 80% of India's UPI instant payments network. Rivals are set to meet with regulators to lobby for restrictions.

news.title: Amazon’s cloud business is surging — and so is its capital spending
news.summary: The e-commerce giant is making more money than expected from AWS but it's also spending a lot, and will continue to do so in the near term, its chief executive said.

news.title: Sources: Anthropic could raise a new $50B round at a valuation of $900B
news.summary: The maker of Claude has received multiple pre-emptive offers at valuations in the $850 billion to $900 billion range, according to sources familiar with the matter.

news.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
news.summary: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

news.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
news.summary: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

news.title: Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
news.summary: About five hours into Elon Musk's testimony, I typed the following sentence into my notes: "I have never been more sympathetic to Sam Altman in my life." news.title: Splatoon Raiders preorders for the Switch 2 are nearly 20 percent off
news.summary: Nintendo recently announced a new pricing policy, which knocks $10 off the cost of digital versions of future first-party titles exclusive to the Nintendo Switch 2. news.title: Microsoft reports sinking Xbox revenue as its cloud business climbs
news.summary: Microsoft's Xbox hardware revenue continues to tumble, with the company revealing a 33 percent decline as part of its earnings report released on Wednesday. news.title: Google Search queries hit an ‘all time high’ last quarter
news.summary: Google Search queries hit an "all time high" in the first quarter of 2026, according to a statement from CEO Sundar Pichai published as part of Alphabet's earnings on Wednesday. news.title: ABC can beat Trump FCC's license threat if owner Disney is willing to fight
news.summary: Broadcast license renewals are "all but automatic" due to 1996 change in US law.

news.title: OpenAI Codex system prompt includes explicit directive to "never talk about goblins"
news.summary: Directions also include system instructions to act like "you have a vivid inner life."

news.title: Howdy's dated $3/month ad-free streaming service said to have 1M subscribers
news.summary: Most are keeping their subscriptions after signing up, too, research firm says.

news.title: New Sam Bankman-Fried trial would be huge waste of court’s time, judge says
news.summary: FTX fraudster came out as Republican, then tried to claim Biden's DOJ targeted him.

news.title: Drone strikes on data centers spook Big Tech, halting Middle East projects
news.summary: Uninsurable war damage is forcing tech companies to rethink Middle East plans.

news.title: How Elon Musk Squeezed OpenAI: They 'Are Gonna Want to Kill Me’
news.summary: Tensions flared on the third day of trial in Musk v. Altman as OpenAI’s lawyers cross-examined Musk.

news.title: Emergency First Responders Say Waymos Are Getting Worse
news.summary: “I believe the technology was deployed too quickly in too vast amounts, with hundreds of vehicles, when it wasn’t really ready,” one police official told federal regulators last month.

news.title: Taylor Swift Wants to Trademark Her Likeness. These TikTok Deepfake Ads Show Why
news.summary: Researchers show scammers are using AI-manipulated footage of celebrity interviews to trick users into sharing their personal data.

news.title: Female Looksmaxxer Alorah Ziva Is Suing Clavicular for Alleged Battery
news.summary: Aleksandra Mendoza, aka Alorah Ziva, alleges that the 20-year-old influencer injected her with drugs on a livestream and had nonconsensual sex with her while she was underage.

news.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
news.summary: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.
